message:
test(oracle): add 8 conformance tests for alias ORDER BY, UPDATE subquery, multi-UNION, expression precedence, empty tables, DISTINCT, printf, multi-table DML

All 8 new oracle tests pass with zero mismatches.
Core: 1705 pass, 0 fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
